creator: fierceinbattle@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 251482
patch

Port of wbg: https://codeberg.org/dnkl/wbg. I have pr upstream at https://codeberg.org/dnkl/wbg/pulls/16, though for the latest version `1.2.0` I think it is best to submit as a port with patches.

This port has various options for what image support you want to build with, I made the default png, jpeg and svg as those cover most peoples needs.
